name: construction contractors managing 5-15 projects simultaneously tool
description: For construction contractors managing 5-15 projects simultaneously, inefficient scheduling causes project delays. We automate equipment maintenance tracking instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or paper logs.
problem_solved: Inefficient scheduling and tracking of equipment maintenance leading to project delays.
features: simple dashboard for tracking maintenance history
